# terrible_community_vmware_vmware_guest_file_operation (Resource)





<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `host_id` (String) ID of the `terrible_host` to run this task against
- `vm_id` (String) Name of the virtual machine to work with.
- `vm_password` (String) The password used to login-in to the virtual machine.
- `vm_username` (String) The user to login in to the virtual machine.

### Optional

- `async_seconds` (Number) Run the task asynchronously, timing out after this many seconds. 0 = synchronous (default).
- `changed_when` (String) Jinja2 expression that overrides when the task is considered changed (e.g. 'false').
- `cluster` (String) The cluster hosting the virtual machine. If set, it will help to speed up virtual machine search.
- `copy` (String) Copy file to vm without requiring network.
- `datacenter` (String) The datacenter hosting the virtual machine. If set, it will help to speed up virtual machine search.
- `delegate_to_id` (String) ID of another terrible_host to delegate execution to.
- `directory` (String) Create or delete a directory. Can be used to create temp directory inside guest using mktemp operation. mktemp sets variable `dir` in the result with the name of the new directory.
- `environment` (String) Environment variables set for the task (dict of name→value).
- `failed_when` (String) Jinja2 expression that overrides when the task is considered failed.
- `fetch` (String) Get file from virtual machine without requiring network.
- `folder` (String) Destination folder, absolute path to find an existing guest or create the new guest. The folder should include the datacenter. ESX's datacenter is ha-datacenter Used only if `vm_id_type=inventory_path`. Examples:    folder: /ha-datacenter/vm    folder: ha-datacenter/vm    folder: /datacenter1/vm    folder: datacenter1/vm    folder: /datacenter1/vm/folder1    folder: datacenter1/vm/folder1    folder: /folder1/datacenter1/vm    folder: folder1/datacenter1/vm    folder: /folder1/datacenter1/vm/folder2    folder: vm/folder2    folder: folder2
- `ignore_errors` (Boolean) When true, a failed task does not raise a Terraform error.
- `poll_interval` (Number) Polling interval in seconds when async_seconds > 0. Defaults to 15.
- `skip_tags` (String) Skip tasks with these Ansible tags (list of strings).
- `tags` (String) Run only tasks with these Ansible tags (list of strings).
- `timeout` (Number) Override the default execution timeout (seconds). Defaults to 300.
- `triggers` (String) Arbitrary map of values; any change triggers task re-execution
- `vm_id_type` (String) The VMware identification method by which the virtual machine will be identified.

### Read-Only

- `changed` (Boolean) Whether the task reported a change
- `id` (String) Unique task resource ID
